creator: joeldiaz@nc.rr.com
text:
Running 'cd /usr/ports/net-p2p/transmission-gtk2 && make install' runs through a port install, but doesn't install /usr/X11R6/bin/transmission-gtk even though pkg_info claims it installed the file.

How-To-Repeat: 

Install net-p2p/transmission-gtk2 and try to run it (you won't find the binary).
